subcodes.first_line: O thou who art turned towards the Kingdom of Abhá! The call of the Abhá Beauty resoundeth from the hidden Kingdom of the unseen realm: Strive unceasingly, O people [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای متوجه بملکوت ابهی ندای جمال ابهی از ملکوت غیب جهان پنهان پیاپی بکوش اهل
subcodes.subjects: @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @power; greatness; centrality of the Covenant
